description: Baseline gzipped Vite bundle size. Frozen by Task 19.1 against commit 99a23443 on 2026-05-08. Enforced with a 110% ceiling per requirements.md §12.1. To update: rebuild fresh (`npm run build`), run `npm run audit -- --stage=perf`, verify the new measurement is intentional, and commit updated values in a deliberate PR.
